case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 1260-1440s checkoutservice metrics. CPU dev=+234 to +248 and mem dev=+24.5 to +25.9 persist across all windows. Socket dev=+2.0 is minor. Traces show high latency but component-local CPU/mem anomalies confirm resource exhaustion as root cause.

Final RCA confirms checkoutservice CPU (dev=+248) and memory (dev=+24) exhaustion as primary root cause. Traces and logs validate propagation effects. Top-3 ranking: checkoutservice_cpu, checkoutservice_mem, emailservice_mem.
